RUNESMITH2-BREAK.description: 摧毁一个卢恩并触发其击碎特效
RUNESMITH2-BREAK.title: 击碎
RUNESMITH2-CHARGE-NONE.description:
当前充能: [blue]{Charge:diff()}[/blue]
充能数将不会被消耗
RUNESMITH2-CHARGE-NONE.title: 充能
RUNESMITH2-CHARGE-TURN-END.description:
当前充能: [blue]{Charge:diff()}[/blue]
回合结束时, 消耗[blue]1[/blue]充能并触发[gold]被动[/gold]能力
RUNESMITH2-CHARGE-TURN-END.title: 充能
RUNESMITH2-CHARGE-TURN-START.description:
当前充能: [blue]{Charge:diff()}[/blue]
回合开始时, 消耗[blue]1[/blue]充能并触发[gold]被动[/gold] 能力
RUNESMITH2-CHARGE-TURN-START.title: 充能
RUNESMITH2-CHARGE.description: 卢恩消耗[blue]1[/blue]充能并触发其被动能力
RUNESMITH2-CHARGE.title: 充能
RUNESMITH2-CRAFT.description:
使用{elements:rs2Icon(all)}锻造一枚卢恩
你最多同时拥有[blue]7[/blue]枚活跃卢恩
RUNESMITH2-CRAFT.title: 锻造
RUNESMITH2-ELEMENTS.description:
元素([gold]火[/gold]{elements:rs2Icon(ignis)}, [gold]地[/gold]{elements:rs2Icon(terra)}, 和[gold]水[/gold]{elements:rs2Icon(aqua)})
可用于打出[gold]配方[/gold]牌或提升某些卡牌效果
RUNESMITH2-ELEMENTS.title: 元素
RUNESMITH2-ELEMENTS_COUNT.description:
你当前拥有的元素量, 由[gold]火[/gold] ({elements:rs2Icon(ignis)}),[gold]地[/gold]({elements:rs2Icon(terra)}), 和[gold]水[/gold] ({elements:rs2Icon(aqua)})构成
元素会用于打出某些卡牌或提升某些卡牌的效果
[color=gray][font_size=16]单击以调整透明度.[/font_size][/color]
RUNESMITH2-ELEMENTS_COUNT.title: 元素
RUNESMITH2-ENHANCE.description: 提升特定卡牌[blue]50%[/blue]的伤害&[gold]格挡[/gold]&[gold]潜能[/gold],可以重复叠加,[gold]增幅[/gold]将在卡牌打出后移除
RUNESMITH2-ENHANCE.title: 增幅
RUNESMITH2-ENHANCED.description: 卡牌的伤害, [gold]格挡[/gold]和[gold]潜能[/gold]已提升[blue]{Amount:diff()}%[/blue],[gold]增幅[/gold]将在卡牌打出后移除
RUNESMITH2-ENHANCED.title: 已增幅
RUNESMITH2-IMPROVED.description: 已[gold]升级[/gold], [gold]附魔[/gold], [gold]增幅[/gold]或[gold]凝滞[/gold]的卡牌视为[gold]卓越[/gold]卡牌
RUNESMITH2-IMPROVED.title: 卓越
RUNESMITH2-POTENCY.description: 潜能指卢恩被[gold]锻造[/gold]时的强度
RUNESMITH2-POTENCY.title: 潜能
RUNESMITH2-RECIPE.description: 元素不足时,配方牌仍能被打出以获取其所需的等额 {elements:rs2Icon(all)}
RUNESMITH2-RECIPE.title: 配方
RUNESMITH2-STASIS.description: 卡牌被打出时不会失去[gold]增幅[/gold]
RUNESMITH2-STASIS.title: 凝滞
